user_intent: Post-run community moment. Group of runners finished their run, stretching together, dapping each other up, laughing and vibing. This is the culture shot — why people come back. Still sweaty and out of breath but the vibes are immaculate. Urban night setting with hard lighting and neon brand colors in the environment.

subject.description: Black woman, late 20s, athletic, dark brown skin covered in sweat, sitting on a concrete curb stretching her quad by pulling her heel to her glute, laughing at something someone said, beads of sweat visible on her forehead, passion twists in a high bun
accessories: water bottle on the ground next to her

subject.description: Black man, early 30s, muscular, dark skin covered in sweat, standing with one arm around person_3's shoulder in a brotherly side hug, big proud smile, catching his breath, veins visible on forearms
clothing: black Run It UP tee with logo on chest damp with sweat
accessories: water bottle in free hand at his side

subject.description: Black man, mid 20s, lean build, medium brown skin, standing with hands on hips catching his breath, looking down at his watch checking his stats, satisfied expression
clothing: black dri-fit tee with sweat stains

subject.description: Black woman, early 30s, curvy athletic, rich brown skin, standing and dabbing her forehead with a small towel, talking to person_1 animatedly with one hand gesturing, genuine smile

scene.location: A street corner in Deep Ellum Dallas Texas at night, the group gathered near a brick wall with a large graffiti mural, a neon bar sign overhead casting lime green light down on the group, a food truck with warm orange lights visible in the background slightly out of focus, the energy of a community that just did something hard together

lighting.direction: hard overhead neon lime green light from a bar sign above casting dramatic top-down shadows on faces, warm orange fill from food truck lights in background, streetlight creating rim light from camera right

materials.texture: rough urban textures, wet sweaty skin, glistening under hard light

composition.framing: environmental group portrait, subjects arranged naturally not posed, filling the frame in a loose semicircle
composition.angle: eye-level, candid documentary style as if the photographer is part of the crew
composition.focus_subject: the group connection is the visual anchor, person_1 and person_2 side hug center frame, all subjects in acceptable focus at f/2.8

quality.sharpness: crisp overall with natural medium format rendering, water droplets frozen sharp in the air
quality.post_processing: warm cinematic color grading, neon lime green and orange color cast from environment, film grain, slightly lifted shadows to see detail in the dark areas, the mood should feel like a candid BTS shot from a Nike campaign not a posed group photo

negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text overlay, distorted hands, extra fingers, cartoon, illustration, flat lighting, posed group photo, everyone looking at camera, stock photo, gym interior, clean and dry, no sweat, corporate, stiff
